rationale: Spec change implementation for implicit session leaks; Improvement type following spec update, not fixing existing nonconformance.
SRV URI with different auth DB returns 'admin' as dbName instead of specified database; connection string parsing spec violation.
Empty description; relaxed ExtJSON parsing improvement, insufficient detail to classify.
dropDatabase with readPreference=nearest throws 'not master'; write commands must target primary per server selection spec; Java driver worked.
Null pointer in replset_state.js on updateMany; implementation crash, no specific SDAM spec rule violated.
Implementing performance benchmark suite; performance work, not spec conformance.
APM API ergonomics improvement; 'other drivers' mentioned generically as background context, not a named behavioral divergence.
Internal refactor consolidating write concern decoration code; no behavior change, no spec rule contradicted.
Driver hangs indefinitely on SRV connection with primary readPreference; implementation timing bug, no specific spec rule identified.
Aggregate ignores user-provided batchSize and defaults to 1000; user-specified cursor options must be honored.
Server error: 'Cursor session id (none) is not the same as the operation context's'; sessions spec requires getMore to use same lsid.
Deprecate snapshot option per SPEC-1033; Improvement type proactively following spec update, not fixing a bug.
Add JSDoc for minSize connection pool option; documentation only.
Refactor to use shared connection string parser from mongodb-core; internal code consolidation, no behavior change.
EJSON relaxed parse returns current time instead of decoded $date value; Extended JSON spec defines canonical date decoding.
txnNumber sent on find commands causing 4.0 error; retryable writes spec restricts txnNumber to write operations only.
Binary constructor doesn't properly handle Uint8Array; implementation type-coercion bug, no specific BSON spec rule violated.
BSON.Binary browser compatibility issues with typed arrays; browser-specific implementation bug.
findOneAndUpdate with empty update replaces document; server behavior, no specific CRUD spec rule about empty update validation.
Remove old Node version test filters; test maintenance, no spec involvement.
Remove stray console.log and uncaught errors from tests; test maintenance only.
Add RegExp encoding/decoding to ExtJSON; feature addition, not fixing a spec violation.
Docs page has 'index' as title; documentation improvement only.
mongoErrorContextSymbol accessed without null-check in change_stream.js; implementation guard bug, no spec rule violated.
Change stream resume broken for promise-based .next; promise wrapper implementation bug, not a distinct spec behavior rule.
BSON serializeFunction test fails due to Node.js version differences in Function.prototype.toString; test infrastructure issue.
Wrong JSDoc for Cursor.addQueryModifier value parameter type (boolean vs object); documentation only.
hasNext() throws 'cursor is exhausted' on second call instead of returning false; cursor spec defines exhausted cursor behavior.
cursor.forEach returns undefined instead of a Promise; Node.js API ergonomics improvement, not a spec requirement.
Resync retryable writes spec tests; DRIVERS-476 dependency; test infrastructure update.
Incorrect field name in text index tutorial code example; documentation only.
Cursor.returnKey documentation incomplete; documentation only.
count() ignores cursor collation; pymongo returns 5 (correct), Node returns 3 (wrong); collation must propagate to count command.
cursor.stream mutates cursor instead of returning ReadableStream; Node.js API design issue, no spec rule violated.
Spec change: only send bypassDocumentValidation if true; DRIVERS-450 dependency, implementing spec update proactively.
Methods 'do not even follow the well-defined inheritance rules set forth in the server selection spec'; explicit spec violation named.
Re-sync transaction spec tests for UnknownTransactionCommitResult label; DRIVERS-505 dependency; test infrastructure update.
Create MongoWriteConcernError class for more specific error catching; internal API improvement, no spec rule contradicted.
Spec: drivers must omit default startAtOperationTime at creation; driver was setting it by default instead of using aggregate operationTime on resume.
Provide transactions code examples for documentation; documentation work only.
Spec: 'Drivers MUST NOT throw custom error, MUST defer to server error' by passing both resumeAfter and startAtOperationTime; driver drops startAtOperationTime.
Driver throws 'Cannot use retryable writes with multi=true'; spec says silently skip retry for non-retryable ops, not throw client error.
Refactor operations into separate lib/operations files; internal code organization, no behavior change.
Kerberos module semver range too strict for pre-1.0 patch versions; dependency packaging issue.
Attach full command response to MongoWriteConcernError; internal error API fix, no spec rule contradicted.
cursor.count() executes against primary instead of inherited SECONDARY read preference; server selection spec requires read preference inheritance.
Add toBSON method to ClientSession to improve cyclic reference error message; internal error messaging improvement.
Remove [param=null] JSDoc syntax in favor of [param]; documentation cleanup only.
Expose Kerberos version mismatch warning message; UX improvement for error messaging, not spec conformance.
Object.assign result not assigned back to options in DB.collection; implementation bug, no spec involvement.
